issues.message: outbound 'quic-ech-reject': Encrypted Client Hello (ECH) is behind the 'tls_ech' feature flag; without it, ECH configuration is silently ignored
issues.hint: enable the 'tls_ech' feature flag at build time for ECH support

issues.message: outbound 'quic-ech-reject': QUIC + ECH is not supported in the current Rust implementation; configuration is rejected by default to avoid silent fallback
issues.hint: set experimental.quic_ech_mode='experimental' only for controlled interop tests, or use TCP-based TLS ECH outbounds
